title: OSI, TCP/IP, Encapsulation, and Traffic Evidence · Packet Lens: Net Osi Layers
summary: Trace a client request through host, switch, router, firewall, service, and return path using captures and diagrams. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net osi layers increment in a layered packet-flow diagnosis. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain the responsibilities and failure evidence of all seven OSI reference-model layers.
Record timeline, environment, commands, findings, actions, outcomes, lessons, and evidence without exposing secrets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
